code-runner.executorMap.java: cd $workspaceRoot && javac -cp "lib/*" -d erp-system/bin erp-system/src/Main.java erp-system/src/config/*.java erp-system/src/model/*.java erp-system/src/dao/*.java erp-system/src/scheduling/*.java erp-system/src/ai/*.java erp-system/src/finance/*.java erp-system/src/reporting/*.java && java -cp "erp-system/bin;lib/*" Main
